title: List of AI Tools (UMMS CARTI Compilation)
content: Companion PDF to the 2025-09-30 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Harnessing AI for Research Funding Success'. Compilation of AI tools relevant to research funding and proposal development, prepared by the University of Maryland School of Medicine Center for AI Research, Translation, and Implementation (UMMS CARTI). Distributed by ORA to MSU faculty as a reference for AI-assisted grant writing workflows.
